Mtn To Compel Production Of Docs And Testimony
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings not reported.

Daniel J. Schacht, Esq., appearing for Judgment Creditor and moving party JMDH Real Estate of San Francisco II, LLC.

Gregory Melvin Haynes, Esq., appearing for Judgment Debtor and responding party Tokunbo Solarin, dba Show Image.
Tokunbo Solaris sworn and examined pursuant to Order of Examination.

Plaintiff JMDH Real Estate of San Francisco II, LLC.'s Motion to Compel The Production of Documents and Testimony: Motion for Contempt Post-Judgment Debtor's Examination; and Request for sanctions is heard this day.
After argument of respective counsel the court granted monetary sanctions in favor of Plaintiff and moving party and against Judgment Debtor Tokunbo Solarin in the amount of $5,000.00. Counsel prevailing party to submit proposed order within five days.
